sql_array: CREATE TABLE date_test (id UInt32, date_str String);
SELECT id, parseDateTimeInJodaSyntaxOrNull(date_str) AS parsed_date FROM date_test WHERE parsed_date IS NOT NULL OR date_str = '';
SELECT id, parsed_date FROM (SELECT id, parseDateTimeInJodaSyntaxOrNull(date_str) as parsed_date FROM date_test) WHERE parsed_date IS NULL OR parsed_date < '2023-10-01 00:00:00';
CREATE TABLE join_test (id UInt32, date_str String, category UInt32);

SELECT a.id, a.parsed_date FROM (SELECT id, parseDateTimeInJodaSyntaxOrNull(date_str) AS parsed_date FROM date_test) AS a JOIN (SELECT id, parseDateTimeInJodaSyntaxOrNull(date_str) AS parsed_date FROM join_test WHERE category = 1) AS b ON a.id = b.id OR a.parsed_date IS NULL;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT id, parseDateTimeInJodaSyntaxOrNull(date_str) AS parsed_date FROM date_test) GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(parsed_date) OR id = 2;
CREATE TABLE precision_test (id UInt32, numeric_str String);
SELECT id, parseDateTimeInJodaSyntaxOrNull(numeric_str) AS parsed_date WHERE parsed_date IS NULL OR numeric_str < '0.1';
